problem_text_cn: 平面$\Sigma_1$与$\Sigma_2$相交于$MN$，夹角$\varphi=45°$，匀强磁场$B$平行于$\Sigma_1$且垂直于$MN$。$\Sigma_2$上有长方形电阻网络（7根电阻丝，长均为$l$），电阻$R_{ab}=R_{fc}=R_{ed}=R$，$R_{af}=R_{bc}=2R$，$R_{fe}=R_{cd}=4R$，电流$I$从$a$流入、$d$流出，求网络所受安培力大小$F$。
problem_text_en: Plane $\Sigma_1$ intersects plane $\Sigma_2$ at $MN$ with an angle $\varphi=45°$. A uniform magnetic field $B$ is parallel to $\Sigma_1$ and perpendicular to $MN$. There is a rectangular resistor network on $\Sigma_2$（7 resistance wires, all length $l$）with resistances $R_{ab}=R_{fc}=R_{ed}=R$，$R_{af}=R_{bc}=2R$，$R_{fe}=R_{cd}=4R$. Current $I$ flows in from $a$ and out from $d$, find the magnitude $F$ of the Ampere force on the network.
problem_solution_cn:
（1）等效电流路径：
- 网络可等效为电流$I$从$a$到$d$的直线电流（闭合回路安培力为零），$ad$长度$l_{ad}=\sqrt{5} l$。
（2）安培力计算：
- 磁场$B$与$ad$的夹角$\theta$满足$\sin\theta=\sqrt{3}/\sqrt{5}$，安培力$F=I l_{ad} B \sin\theta=\sqrt{3} I l B$。
problem_solution_en:
（1）Equivalent current path：
- The network can be equivalent to a straight-line current $I$ from $a$ to $d$（the Ampere force of a closed loop is zero），length $l_{ad}=\sqrt{5} l$。
（2）Ampere force calculation：
- The angle $\theta$ between magnetic field $B$ and $ad$ satisfies $\sin\theta=\sqrt{3}/\sqrt{5}$，Ampere force $F=I l_{ad} B \sin\theta=\sqrt{3} I l B$。
problem_answer: 网络所受安培力大小$F=\sqrt{3} I l B$
